STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER FILED BY BOYLAND, TROY L. OCHOA, BRENDA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOYLAND, TROY L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OCHOA, BRENDA SEGASTURE, EVE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF TO FIND DEFENDANTS LIABLE FOR DEFAMATION. THE STATEMENT OF DEFENDANTS PRESENTED TO THE COURT ABOUT THE PLAINTIFF REPRESENT SUBJECTIVE IMPRESSIONS OF THE DEFENDANTS INTERACTIONS WITH THE PLAINTIFF, NOT FACTS CAPABLE OF BEING PROVEN TRUE OR FALSE. JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
